text.message: Didn’t realize placing down a settlement automatically gives you the port
It’s common sense with you having the one beside it uncontested
Yes but I wanted the better one
All good though. Just know why you’re targeted
Yeah yeah go cry about it bud
Nah ur name is clown we know
Orange only goal is to make enemies lol
I’m tryna play for road sorry
Also cry you solo blocked me for no reason
Could’ve asked and didn’t need to solo
settling on 11 desert to cut off a player at 3 pts is wild
I don’t have anywhere else to go that keeps me playing for road
can do any other trades if you want
I have no port or ore
I’ll be stuck here all game
I’m cool with red winning tbh
Black try not to let games bug you so much in the future isn’t great for your mental
Maybe a lesson learned for you on not picking a bunch of fights
I think it’s a little much to say that
I’m playing as I’m in line to pickup deliveries to bring food to homeless people for Thanksgiving
